releaseNotes:
• Storage cleanup: exporting (QR/LAN or save-to-file) no longer leaves old export files behind. Each new export now clears the previous export bundles from temporary storage — these could be large when a database snapshot was included — so repeated exports no longer fill up disk space.
• Developer: the playback-stats overlay (and its diagnostic log) now also show the active frame-drop and A/V sync modes.
